steps.title: Use the line of best fit, not a dot
steps.content: The question asks for the predicted value at $x=2$. Prediction comes from the drawn line of best fit, not from a nearby scatterplot point.

steps.title: Read the y-value at x = 2
steps.content: Find $x=2$ on the horizontal axis and move vertically until you hit the line of best fit. The line is just under $15$ there, about $14.8$.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 2
steps.content: The closest answer choice to about $14.8$ is $15$, so Choice D — 15.
